case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. LUNA CABLING SOLUTIONS INC. DBA STRUCTURED CABLING et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ROGER GUERTIN RE: ORIGINAL AGREEMENT (EVID 1521,1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUNA CABLING SOLUTIONS INC. DBA STRUCTURED CABLING SOLUTIONS, INC. LUNA, RON POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $22,511.72 DAMAGES, $2,600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $715.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,827.66, COST INCLUDES $505.94 INTEREST; SEE EXHIBIT "1" FOR THE DESCRIPTION & VALUE OF THE PROPERTY; SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $210.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA CABLING SOLUTIONS INC. DBA STRUCTURED CABLING SOLUTIONS, INC. LUNA, RON
